verses.1: A Psalm for Thanksgiving. Shout joyfully to the LORD, all the earth.
verses.2: Serve the LORD with jubilation; Come before Him with rejoicing.
verses.3: Know that the LORD Himself is God; It is He who has made us, and not we ourselves; We are His people and the sheep of His pasture.
verses.4: Enter His gates with thanksgiving, And His courtyards with praise. Give thanks to Him, bless His name.
verses.5: For the LORD is good; His mercy is everlasting And His faithfulness is to all generations.
